description_long: This bed features a robust wooden frame with prominent, squared posts at each corner, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The headboard and footboard are both solid, with the headboard slightly taller and shaped with a gentle arch. The bed is topped with a thick blue mattress, covered by a blue sheet and two matching pillows, all neatly arranged. The frame sits on four wide, blocky legs, elevating the bed off the ground and adding to its substantial look. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, contrasting with the cool blue bedding. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for both residential and upscale urban settings.
description: A sturdy wooden bed with a solid arched headboard, blocky posts, and blue bedding, exuding a traditional and robust style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched headboard, two blue pillows, and the squared posts at each corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick blue mattress, blue sheet, and the solid wooden frame with prominent posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the footboard with a matching arch and the squared posts, with the bedding slightly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mattress, sheet, and the detailed wooden frame with posts and legs.
